text.p: INSTITUTION OF BRYOLOGY PRIZE IN THE DEPARTMENT OF BOTANY
I would like an annual Bryology Prize to be instituted in the Department of Botany.

The prize, to be called Professor
prize in Bryology, will be awarded to the graduating student in Botany who scores the highest grade in BOT 405: BRYOLOGY and whose Class of degree is not less than Second Upper Division (2:1). This award should commence in the 2008/2009 session.
I forward with this letter a Union Bank of Nigeria PLC cheque No. for One hundred thousand naira (#100,000.00) only payable to the Bursar, OAU for the inauguration of the Bryology Prize.
I also forward copies of my Curriculum Vitae.
